Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Death Monarch Yerin Arelius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin Arelius is a disciple of the Sword Sage.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin Arelius carries a pale sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin Arelius's Goldsign is a pair of silver arms that flatten into sword-blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin Arelius wears a red rope of living madra around her waist that is rank with blood aura.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin Arelius spoke through the transmission construct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin Arelius is an adopted member of the House Arelius clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin Arelius is ranked eleventh in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Yerin Arelius took a crown during the competition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin Arelius is of the Blackflame Empire and a chosen of Akura Malice.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith wants to tutor Yerin Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin Arelius has cultivated her Blood Shadow with a technique created by the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin Arelius is the victor of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Yerin Arelius was expected to drive off the Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin Arelius is the Uncrowned Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin Arelius is a person of interest to Red Faith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin Arelius hated her Blood Shadow and the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin Arelius can be tracked with spiritual perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin Arelius is a character with red eyes.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin is an Overlady.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Reigan Shen wants Lindon and Yerin Arelius gone.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin Arelius protects the cult of the Bleeding Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The Death Monarch Yerin Arelius lost her home to the Phoenix.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
